text.tspan: Instruction: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age >= 18

ul.li: Instruction Format: Opcode P1 P2 P3 P4 P5.

Memory Model:
Registers (r[N]): Stores integers, floats, strings, or NULLs.
Cursors: Handles for B-Tree traversal.
B-Tree Integration: VDBE provides logic; B-Tree provides raw byte access to pages.
